desc: Opens the Transfer from Existing window — a WebView2 tool window for transferring view templates, filters, families, system types, object styles, annotation families, shared parameters, schedule types, and materials from a source .rvt into the current project.
summary: Opens the Transfer from Existing window — a WebView2 tool window for transferring view templates, filters, families, system types, object styles, annotation families, shared parameters, schedule types, and materials from a source .rvt into the current project. Uses TransferStandardsFromExistingWindow.ShowSingleton to enforce singleton pattern.
usecase: User wants to import project standards from a firm template into a new or existing project.
notfor: Transferring individual elements between open projects (use copy/paste or Transfer Project Standards dialog).
precondition: Active document must be open. WebView2 runtime must be installed.
postcondition: Transfer from Existing window is displayed as a modeless WPF window.

successprompts: Transfer from Existing window is now open.
failureprompts: Failed to open Transfer from Existing: {error}
